title: Klaviyo vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Klaviyo and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Klaviyo excels at e-commerce automation with advanced analytics, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses with simplicity and affordability. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your marketing strategy.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium with free tier for up to 500 subscribers
E-commerce brands on Shopify and WooCommerce
Predictive analytics, segmentation, flows, e-commerce integrations
comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, social media ads, list building tools

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce business on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced automation
You want to start with a free plan to test the platform before paying
You need predictive analytics and sophisticated customer segmentation
choose_b_if: You're a nonprofit or local business looking for simplicity and affordable pricing
You need event management and social media advertising features
You prefer a straightforward platform without steep learning curves

faq.q: Is Klaviyo better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce businesses requiring advanced automation and analytics, with higher user satisfaction scores (4.6 vs 4.0 on G2). However, Constant Contact may be better for nonprofits and local businesses seeking simplicity and lower starting costs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at $12/month, making it cheaper upfront. However, Klaviyo offers a free tier for up to 500 subscribers, making it the most cost-effective option for small businesses just starting out. Both platforms' pricing scales with your subscriber count.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, you can switch between platforms. Both tools support contact list exports, and Klaviyo has integrations that can help with data migration. You should plan the transition carefully to avoid campaign disruption and ensure all historical data is properly transferred.
